intro.label: // 01 — about me
intro.bio: I'm Moris, a student at BSZ Leonberg and starting October, a dual student at DHBW with SV Informatik GmbH. At the same time, I've been ski racing since I was three years old and compete with the Ski Team Seibelseckle in the German Ski League.

projects.label: // projects
projects.subtext: Full-stack web applications, AI experiments and more.

abiball.title: Prom Portal
abiball.desc: Event management system for prom planning. PHP backend with authentication, participant management, meal orders and payment tracking.

itPuzzle.title: IT Puzzle
itPuzzle.desc: Web platform for testing applicants with IT-related puzzles and challenges. Built during my internship at SSC-Services.

blackjack.title: Blackjack AI
blackjack.desc: Card-counting AI for blackjack, developed as a seminar project. Combines card counting with image recognition for optimal strategy.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.desc: This website, built with React, Three.js and a custom ASCII renderer that displays a 3D STL model as code characters.

a2026.title: 2nd Place German Ski League
a2026.desc: Defended second place in the team standings of the German Ski League.
